sections.one_line: Append-only audit log for kernel runtime events and typed transitions
Runtime query surface for persistent kernel state, profiles, knowledge, covenants, and triggers
Runs LLM reasoning chains with tool loops, retries, fallback, and cost tracking.
Per-tool-call authorization and safety verdicts for tool dispatch
Cross-member message routing with permission checks, messenger judgment, and delivery scheduling
Inbound turn routing for space, focus, and mode before the agent sees it.
Boundary-triggered durable fact extraction with reconciliation and stewardship insight capture
Boundary-triggered per-space compaction that rewrites Living State and archives compressed spans
Periodic awareness scans that surface actionable whispers and resume interrupted self-directed plans
Post-turn detection of friction signals and correction suggestions from turn traces
Self-directed plan execution, persistence, retries, and restart recovery
Unified catalog for kernel, MCP, and workspace tools with effect classification
Workspace for building, testing, validating, and registering agent-made tools
Persistent schedules that fire tasks and dispatch synthetic inbound messages
Last read-time filter that blocks facts outside a member's disclosure context
Key code entry points for Kernos primitives
